why_now: Reported vulnerability in a widely-used platform like GitLab.
recommended_actions_24h: Isolate and monitor GitLab EE instances
recommended_actions_7d: Update GitLab EE to the latest version
title: CVE-2026-10087: GitLab EE RCE
summary: [P1] GitLab EE is vulnerable to a remote code execution vulnerability, with no patch available. This vulnerability is not yet exploited in the wild, but its presence in a widely-used platform like GitLab makes it a high-risk item. Why now: Reported vulnerability in a widely-used platform like GitLab. (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: GitLab EE is a specific application with a known RCE vulnerability.

enrichment.lede: CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog.
